attributes.name: Agilent IPCmini
attributes.description:
• Selection of positive (diode, noble diode) or negative (StarCell, triode) polarity outputs to meet your needs

  • iSTEP voltage feature ensures highest pumping speed and lowest leakage current resulting in most accurate pressure measurement down to the 1 x 10–10 mbar range

  • Convenient front-panel USB port for data acquisition

  • Programmable outputs for operation of any other ion pump

  • I/O response time of <30 msec (typical)

  • Built-in set points, remote operation, and RS232/485 computer interface are standard (Ethernet optional)

  • IProtect disables high-voltage output in the event of a leak or increase in gas load to preserve ion pump lifetime

  • Interlock system immediately shuts down the high voltage when the plug is removed from the pump

  • Compliant with EN 61326-1 2013 and EN 61010-1 2010

  • Shipped without a power cord, to be ordered separately
